title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode is a widely used open-source AI coding agent with terminal and desktop workflows, built-in planning and build agents, broad package-manager support, and active releases. It appeared as one of the most prominent AI-related GitHub candidates in the day’s collection.
friendlySummary: OpenCode is a popular open-source coding agent that runs in the terminal and also has a desktop app. It supports different agent modes for planning and building.
whyItMatters: Developers can use it as a transparent coding-agent alternative, inspect how agent workflows are implemented, or adapt its planning/build-agent pattern for their own tools.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is useful for developers who want a coding agent they can inspect, run locally, and adapt. Teams can also study how its agent workflow is designed.
